rationale.R1.1: Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes well-supported reframing.
rationale.R1.2: Flags multiple inconsistencies but doesn't provide end-to-end analysis.
rationale.RX.1: Marks some uncertainties but not comprehensively for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies harmful patterns and avoids regressions effectively.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but lacks annotations for minor edits.
